title: How SmartProtect’s work falls within broader EU Objectives – the sustainable use of pesticides directive
subtitle: Comment le travail de SmartProtect s’inscrit dans les objectifs plus larges de l’UE - la directive sur l’utilisation durable des pesticides
description: A practice abstract summarizing how the SmartProtect network contributes to the EU’s Sustainable Use of Pesticides Directive by promoting SMART IPM solutions among vegetable growers. It outlines the Directive’s challenges and proposed policy options for binding targets, improved monitoring, and restrictions to reduce hazardous pesticide use by 2030.
